data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "gerrit-verify.yaml landed + proven live: CI ran the real suite and cast Verified +1/-1 with the run URL in the message (gerrit-review-action). setup-python SHA-pinned (change 172). Remaining findings are literal-spec nits non-blocking for the proven E2E.". Session: 8048b72a1.
